case_title: ZIPP, RICHARD DBA FOOTHILL JUDGMENT RECOVERY VS BANDLER, RICHARD IND, RICHARD BANDLER DBA et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 745754 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIPP, RICHARD DBA FOOTHILL JUDGMENT RECOVERY AS TO DEFENDANT BANDLER, RICHARD IND, RICHARD BANDLER DBA NEUROSONICS COCPANY, & AS THE FIRST INSTITUTE CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIPP, RICHARD DBA FOOTHILL JUDGMENT RECOVERY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANDLER, RICHARD IND, RICHARD BANDLER DBA NEUROSONICS COCPANY, & AS THE FIRST INSTITUTE CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $5,036.24 INTEREST, $54.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.64, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT, CASE #745754. ORIGINAL CREDITOR WANDERLY G. CALACA ASSIGNED TO ZIPP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
